basicInfo.name: Nightmare Destruction Dellons
basicInfo.flavor: Dellons has regained his sanity and become the ruler of the long-unclaimed Dark Grave. It is said that all the dead await the Grim Reaper's command.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 130% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Silence. [Duration: 10 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 130% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Deathly Slice
Skill 1.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 120% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Silence. [Duration: 10 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 120% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Reaper's Advent
Skill 2.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 40% of Physical Attack 5 time(s).
 - Instant Execution of an enemy with 7% or lower HP.
 - Activates again up to 5 time(s) with 100% power upon defeating an enemy with this skill.
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 40% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Beyond the Veil
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants All Damage Nullification. [Ends After: Taking 10 Hit(s)]
 - Revives with Immortality upon falling in battle. [Duration: 25 Turn(s)] [Once per Battle]
 - All Allies
 - Heals HP equal to 20% of the caster's Max HP upon using a skill 1 time(s).

profile.story:
Dellons was born the eldest son of the Blackscythe family, a long and storied lineage of knights in service to the ancient Skytria Empire. He grew up amongst other nobles and received an education fit for a knight.
He fell in love with a princess while assigned as her guard. However, both he and the princess were killed by the Silversword family.
Before the princess died, she cursed Dellons with immortality. Throughout the years, he underwent many deaths and rebirths in futile attempts to revive his lover.
His memories grew hazier and hazier, and gradually wore away at his sanity.
When he awoke in the current day, he found the Skytria Empire a thing of the ancient past, and the continent had been divided into seven separate territories.
His memories faded so much that he forgot about his quest to revive his lover and instead joined Silvesta on his quest to rid the world of the Power of Destruction once and for all.
However, when he met the lich, Bane, he was reminded of his true self and purpose.
